title: O LORD, How Many Are My Foes!

verses.text: You are my shield and glory, LORD, the lifter of my head. I cried out “LORD!” and from his hill his answer to me sped.
I lay down, slept, and woke again; the LORD sustains my life. Tho’ thousands round me take their stand, I fear not in the strife.
Arise, O LORD, and save me, God! You punish all my foes. You smite the face of wicked men, and break their teeth with blows.
Deliv’rance to the LORD belongs, Salvation his alone! Your blessing on your people, LORD, Forevermore be shown!
